title: Bridge Essay: Meditation-Induced Self-Boundary Flexibility and Prosociality: A MEG and Behavio

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution.

**Meditation-Induced Self-Boundary Flexibility and Prosociality: A MEG and Behavioral Measures Study.**. Brain sciences.. PMID: 39766380. DOI: 10.3390/brainsci14121181. In the last decade, empirical studies on the beneficial effects of meditation on prosocial capacities have accumulated, but the underlying mechanisms remain unclear. Buddhist sources state that liberating oneself from afixed view of the self by gaining access to its transitory and malleable nature leads to increased compassion and other prosocial traits.
